tasks.subject: Fix qbittorrent submodule checkout error
tasks.description: Diagnose and fix the submodule checkout issue for 'qbittorrent' which fails with 'fatal: remote error: upload-pack: not our ref'. This usually happens when the submodule pointer in the main repo refers to a commit that doesn't exist in the submodule's remote (possibly due to a rebase or force push in the submodule repo).

tasks.subject: Fix bobtrader submodule checkout error (nested submodule)
tasks.description: Diagnose and fix the nested submodule checkout issue for 'bobtrader'. The error 'fatal: No url found for submodule path ... in .gitmodules' indicates a broken submodule configuration in 'submodules/page-03/ericjang__cryptocurrency_arbitrage', likely due to a missing or misconfigured .gitmodules file within that submodule.
